title: ConvApparel: Measuring and bridging the realism gap in user simulators
Microsoft Copilot for Business: What It Is, How It Works, and What ROI to Expect
summary: If you're still figuring out whether Microsoft Copilot is worth your attention, this article gives you a concrete answer: based on independent research, real deployments, and what we've learned building Copilot-based solutions for our clients. We'll cover both: what Copilot does out of the box, and what it takes to make it a true interface to your organization's systems. Artykuł Microsoft Copilot for Business: What It Is, How It Works, and What ROI to Expect pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI .
author: Katarzyna Rojewska

title: The end of Llama? Meta launches Muse Spark
summary: Muse Spark, the first AI model from the Meta Superintelligence Labs, can see, reason, and solve complex problems using multiple agents in parallel. With Contemplating mode and built-in capabilities for health, coding, and social insights, the model marks a major step toward personal superintelligence.

title: EDR Isn’t Enough: Why Forward-Thinking CISOs Are Turning to Network + Identity by Mark Wojtasiak
summary: EDR alone can’t stop modern breaches. Learn why CISOs are uniting network and identity signals to outpace attackers and build resilience.
